testing_centers.notes: In-person test centers and online proctored (OnVUE)

id_requirements: One primary, government-issued ID with name, photo, and signature (passport, driver's license, national ID card). Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, phones, or notes in testing area. Scratch paper provided by testing center. No breaks for most exams (unscheduled breaks allowed but timer continues). Online proctored: no second monitor, must be alone in room, no virtual machines or remote desktop.
renewal_options: Recertify by passing current version before expiry, or earn recertification credit via eligible AWS exam or training activities.

retake_policy.notes: After first failed attempt: 14-day waiting period. After each subsequent failed attempt: additional 14-day waiting period. No limit on total attempts.

official_study_resources.title: AWS Official Practice Exam (via Skill Builder)
AWS Skill Builder (free tier)
official_study_resources.notes: Free and paid digital training; subscription includes full practice exams
